title: BEM-970 SHA script patch diag
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text()
old = "'commit_sha': commit_sha or None"
new = "'commit_sha': (commit_sha or os.environ.get('GITHUB_SHA') or None)"
found = old in text
if found:
    text = text.replace(old, new, 1)
    p.write_text(text)
    changed_files.append(str(p))
    ops_applied.append('bem970_sha_field_replaced')
else:
    ops_applied.append('bem970_sha_field_target_not_found')
diag = Path('governance/reports/BEM970_SHA_FIELD_PATCH_DIAG.txt')
diag.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
diag.write_text('target_found=' + str(found) + '\n')
changed_files.append(str(diag))
"""
Create file governance/reports/BEM970_RUN_SCRIPT_SHA_FIELD_PATCH_DIAG.md with content BEM-970 | RUN SCRIPT SHA FIELD PATCH DIAG | 2026-05-31 | 15:11 (UTC+3)

Этап: 20/21 (95%)
Дорожная карта BEM-931 foundation: 14/14 (100%); release gates: 0/4 (0%)

Чек-лист:
✅ Uses Run script because Pattern 9 cannot safely match quoted Python dict keys.
✅ Writes diagnostic target_found=true/false.
⚠️ If workflow changed, next BEM-971 verifies non-null SHA.
❌ No release PASS.

| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |
|---|---|---|
| Root cause | Pattern 9 regex closes on inner quote and can fake changed_files without actual replacement | BEM-968 changed_files but raw workflow still old |
| Patch method | Run script with quote-safe Python replacement | avoids Pattern 9 limitation |
| Следующее действие | BEM-971 verification probe | proof before status upgrade |

No issue comments.
